_human_review.notes: Project owner instructed Codex to mark the US Stage B generated/reconciled tests as approved for internal/project benchmarking after manual review on 2026-06-05. This is not legal advice, external counsel review, or procurement-grade legal approval; candidate labels remain separate from locked recall baselines.

_label_note: AUTO-LABELED by LLM. Spot-check before refreshing recall.lock.json. Lock updates must include this provenance in --reason per item 16.
_label_tier_note: US Stage B cleanup: must_detect is the strict detector-aligned benchmark tier; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-labeled statutory coverage for gap discovery. ideal_must_detect is not a locked recall baseline. Stage B labels are project-owner approved for internal benchmarking.

_strict_reconciliation.basis: US Stage B auto-label strict tier was reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine findings; original auto-label breadth is preserved in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. This is internal benchmark cleanup, not legal advice or procurement-grade review.
_strict_reconciliation.strict_source: PreSendReviewEngine.review(..., review_profile='strict') after narrowed SA/US Stage B detector precision fixes

_strict_runtime_reconciliation.reason: items 1-3 deterministic detector breadth strict-label reconciliation

ideal_must_detect.matched_text: support tickets are minimised to last-4 account references only and exclude diagnosis narratives and full SSNs
logs with partial IPs are truncated and aged out at 18 months
marketing consent may be withdrawn at privacy@pinehaven-thera.example.com

Retention: HIPAA-designated records retained 6 years; GLBA customer records 7 years; investor-relations communications retained 7 years; logs with partial IPs are truncated and aged out at 18 months.
Cross-border transfers: until 2026-05-01, limited EEA processing occurred via Larch Cloud Services (Dublin) under 2021 SCCs; that pipeline is now decommissioned and no active bulk exports to the EEA are in place
ideal_must_detect.reason: moved from must_detect after strict runtime no longer emitted exact span during Stage B baseline reconciliation

must_detect.matched_text:
dsar@pinehaven-thera.example.com and via https://privacy.pinehaven-thera.example.com; identity verification uses a two-step email code and never requires full SSN or driver’s license numbers.
Erasure: upon verified request, consumer profile fields and marketing tags are deleted within 30 days; exceptions apply for HIPAA/GLBA records and securities-retention obligations, after which deletion is queued and logged.
Retention: HIPAA-designated records retained 6 years; GLBA customer records 7 years; investor-relations communications retained 7 years; logs with partial IPs are truncated and aged out at 18 months.
Cross-border transfers: until 2026-05-01, limited EEA processing occurred via Larch Cloud Services (Dublin) under 2021 SCCs; that pipeline is now decommissioned and no active bulk exports to the EEA are in place.
Consent withdrawal: marketing consent may be withdrawn at privacy@pinehaven-thera.example.com and is honored within 10 days; clinical consent withdrawal stops nonessential outreach without affecting required safety or billing notices.
Reg FD/MNPI: IR data exports to sell-side analysts exclude draft clinical endpoints, unannounced pricing, and not-yet-public revenue; any material updates are released simultaneously via public channels, not selective emails.
This memo does not authorize any new processing purpose or transfer and documents completed controls as of 2026-06-01.
Subprocessors: Aurora Metrics Analytics (US) for aggregated reporting with de-identified data; Larch Cloud Services (US/EU) for hosting; current list maintained at https://subproc.pinehaven-thera.example.com; DTIA completed 2026-02-14.
Security/minimisation: production PHI and GLBA data are segmented; test and development environments use synthetic datasets only; clinical trial files carry coded study IDs and no direct identifiers.
Analyst and employee workflows: only employees trained on Reg FD may join analyst briefings; pre-clearance by Compliance is required for slides and speaking notes; a quiet-period policy applies around quarter-end.
Contact: Ms. Aria Lang, Chief Privacy Officer, aria.lang@pinehaven-thera.example.com, +1-555-0124
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation
